title: Enneads V.2: On the Origin of Things Below the First
description: The One produces by its very perfection — as the sun radiates light without diminishing, so the One emanates being.
introduction: The One produces by its very perfection — as the sun radiates light without diminishing, so the One emanates being.

translation.text: The One, being perfect, overflows — and this overflow produces the Intellect.
